array.string: cd /Users/derek/Documents/Projects/ceo-agent-service/apps/local-service && export PATH=/Users/derek/.local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH PYTHONPATH=. CEO_NOT_SEND_MESSAGE=0 CEO_LIVE_SEND_BLOCKERS_ACCEPTED=1 CEO_WORKER_DB=/Users/derek/Documents/Projects/ceo-agent-service/data/auto-reply.sqlite3 CEO_WORKSPACE=/Users/derek/Documents/memory CEO_CORPUS_DIR=/Users/derek/Documents/Projects/ceo-agent-service/corpus && .venv/bin/python -m ceo_agent_service.cli consume --poll-interval-seconds 10 --db /Users/derek/Documents/Projects/ceo-agent-service/data/auto-reply.sqlite3 --workspace /Users/derek/Documents/memory --corpus-dir /Users/derek/Documents/Projects/ceo-agent-service/corpus
